mapper.sql: select c.id,c.user_id,c.product_id,p.name product_name,p.cover_url product_cover,p.price unit_price, c.quantity,p.stock,c.selected from cart_item c join product p on p.id=c.product_id
mapper.select: where c.user_id=#{userId} order by c.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into cart_item(user_id,product_id,quantity,selected,create_time,update_time) values(#{userId},#{productId},#{quantity},1,now(),now()) on duplicate key update quantity=least(quantity+values(quantity),99),update_time=now()
mapper.update: update cart_item set quantity=#{quantity},update_time=now() where id=#{id} and user_id=#{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from cart_item where id=#{id} and user_id=#{userId}
delete from cart_item where user_id=#{userId} and id in #{id}
